# Context Loader

> System for selecting and loading context modules into a coding agent's workspace.

## Platform Backend
- [platform/src/server.py](platform/src/server.py) — FastAPI app factory, constants, SPA fallback, entry point
- [platform/src/models.py](platform/src/models.py) — Pydantic request/response models
- [platform/src/llms.py](platform/src/llms.py) — llms.txt generation and parsing helpers
- [platform/src/routes/modules.py](platform/src/routes/modules.py) — Module CRUD and file CRUD endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/workspace.py](platform/src/routes/workspace.py) — Workspace load, secrets endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/chat.py](platform/src/routes/chat.py) — Chat SSE streaming endpoint
- [platform/src/routes/health.py](platform/src/routes/health.py) — Health check endpoint
- [platform/src/services/github.py](platform/src/services/github.py) — GitHub API client, module download, cache
- [platform/src/services/schemas.py](platform/src/services/schemas.py) — Env schema generation, parsing, Infisical augmentation
- [platform/src/services/secrets.py](platform/src/services/secrets.py) — Varlock secret status and loading
- [platform/frontend/](platform/frontend/) — React SPA (Vite + TanStack Router + TanStack Query)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/](platform/frontend/src/api/) — API client layer (fetch wrapper, modules, workspace, chat)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/](platform/frontend/src/components/) — React components (Sidebar, Chat, ModuleRegistry, etc.)
- [platform/frontend/src/routes/](platform/frontend/src/routes/) — TanStack Router file-based routes
- [platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts](platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts) — Utility to translate raw tool call names/args into human-readable labels with module resolution
- [Dockerfile](Dockerfile) — Multi-stage container image (Node build + Python runtime)
## Self-Hosting
- [docker-compose.yml](docker-compose.yml) — Docker Compose for deployment (pulls image) and dev (--build)
- [.env.example](.env.example) — Environment variable template for self-hosted deployment
- [.github/workflows/publish.yml](.github/workflows/publish.yml) — CI workflow to build and push image to GHCR

## Docs
- [docs/plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md](docs/plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md) — Plan: FileBrowser Quantum
- [docs/plans/04-cli-cmux.md](docs/plans/04-cli-cmux.md) — Plan: CLI with cmux
- [docs/plans/09-module-management-react.md](docs/plans/09-module-management-react.md) — Plan: Module management UI with React SPA
- [docs/plans/10-module-llms-txt.md](docs/plans/10-module-llms-txt.md) — Plan: Multi-file module structure with llms.txt navigation
- [docs/plans/11-registry-ux.md](docs/plans/11-registry-ux.md) — Plan: Module registry UX improvements (detail panel, multi-file, secrets)

## Guides
- [docs/guides/infisical-setup.md](docs/guides/infisical-setup.md) — Step-by-step Infisical setup for module secrets
- [docs/guides/git-module-loading-test.md](docs/guides/git-module-loading-test.md) — Testing GitHub API module loading with a private repo and token

- [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) — Project overview, architecture, and current state
